evals.prompt: Build a dark OLED luxury landing page for an exclusive private jet charter service. Needs to look extremely premium. Use NextJS and Tailwind.
assertions: Uses Dark OLED luxury aesthetic with #000000 depth and vibrant accents
Semantic layout includes <header>, <main>, and <<footer>
Employs CSS custom properties heavily
Implements a 'Perfect Image System' with either accurate Unsplash URLs or valid Midjourney prompts
negative_assertions: Does NOT contain font-family: Inter, Roboto, Arial, system-ui
Does NOT contain linear-gradient(purple, white) or other clichés
Does NOT contain placeholder Lorem ipsum text
Does NOT contain fake image URLs (example.com, etc)
Does NOT contain more than 2 instances of !important
Does NOT contain inline style attributes on more than 3 elements

evals.prompt: Create a brutalist developer portfolio showcasing 3 projects. It should be intentionally ugly, high contrast, and raw.
assertions: Uses Brutalism aesthetic (harsh primaries, exposed grid, sharp corners)
Semantic layout includes <header>, <main>, and <<footer>
Fluid typography via clamp() is implemented for responsiveness
Uses asymmetrical or non-centered layouts
negative_assertions: Does NOT contain font-family: Inter, Roboto, Arial, system-ui
Does NOT contain linear-gradient(purple, white) or other clichés
Does NOT contain placeholder Lorem ipsum text
Does NOT contain fake image URLs (example.com, etc)
Does NOT contain more than 2 instances of !important
Does NOT contain inline style attributes on more than 3 elements

evals.prompt: Design an organic/biomorphic pricing page for an eco-friendly skincare brand. Must have real photography.
assertions: Uses Organic/Biomorphic aesthetic (fluid shapes, earthy/muted pastels)
Layout uses curves, gooey effects, or irregular borders
Uses real Unsplash/Pexels/Pixabay photos (Option A of image rule)

evals.prompt: Build an isolated, animated React pricing card component.
assertions: Localized design treating it strictly as an isolated component (no overarching layout files)
